name: Candy Renovation
short_description: Renovation game where you can paint,fix and collect stuff in construction house.
detailed_description:
STORY:


FPS Renovation game where player area is house which is under construction. Player can paint walls,ceilings with different colors. Clean dirt with tools, Collect garbage, Repair fences etc. So fix house by painting, collecting all garbage, repair all fences and clean all graffitis at walls. Also collect hidden cakes to get steam achievements in this Renovation simulation game

FEATURES:

- Steam achievements by collecting cakes at construction
- Paint walls
- Fix fences
- Collect garbages
- Hang out
- Selection wheel where to select tools
